name: concert-ticket-platform
description: 全栈演唱会票务购买平台

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend-user && pnpm install && cd ../frontend-admin && pnpm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:user" "pnpm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:user && pnpm run build:admin
